title: Best of Kenya Safari - South Edition
description: Kenya pioneered the safari experience and remains a country of striking contrasts, from snow-capped mountains to lush tropical forests and golden beaches. This journey showcases Kenya’s diverse landscapes, cultures and wildlife. The safari explores iconic parks including Amboseli, Lake Nakuru and the Maasai Mara before ending with relaxation along the Indian Ocean coast at Diani Beach. Between July and October, guests may also witness the dramatic Great Wildebeest Migration as thousands of animals move from the Serengeti into the Maasai Mara in search of greener pastures.
highlights: Elephant viewing in Amboseli with views of Mount Kilimanjaro
Forest wildlife experience at Serena Mt Lodge near Mount Kenya
Flamingoes and rhinos at Lake Nakuru National Park
Boat ride and birdlife viewing at Lake Naivasha
Game drives in the Maasai Mara with chances of spotting the Big Five
Relaxing beach stay at Diani Beach on the Indian Ocean
Opportunity to witness the Great Wildebeest Migration (July-October)

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Amboseli National Park
itinerary.description: Early morning departure from Nairobi to Amboseli National Park across the Athi and Kapiti plains. Arrive in time for lunch at Amboseli Serena Lodge followed by an afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Amboseli National Park
itinerary.description: Full day exploring Amboseli with morning and afternoon game drives. Enjoy excellent elephant sightings and views of Mount Kilimanjaro. Optional visit to a Maasai village.

itinerary.title: Amboseli to Mount Kenya
itinerary.description: After breakfast depart for the central highlands and arrive at Serena Mt Lodge near Mount Kenya for lunch. The lodge overlooks a waterhole frequented by wildlife.

itinerary.title: Mount Kenya to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.description: Drive through the Great Rift Valley escarpment to Lake Nakuru National Park. Arrive for lunch at Sarova Lion Hill Lodge followed by an afternoon game drive among flamingoes and rhinos.

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru to Lake Naivasha
itinerary.description: Short drive to Lake Naivasha. Check in at Lake Naivasha Sopa Lodge and enjoy an afternoon boat excursion to Crescent Island.

itinerary.title: Lake Naivasha to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Depart for the Maasai Mara, travelling across the Rift Valley floor. Arrive for lunch at Ashnil Mara Camp followed by an afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Full day game viewing in the Maasai Mara with opportunities to see the Big Five and many other wildlife species.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Another full day exploring the Maasai Mara with optional full day game drive and picnic lunch.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara to Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Early morning departure from Maasai Mara to Nairobi followed by a flight to Diani. Transfer to Baobab Beach Resort & Spa for a relaxing coastal stay.

itinerary.title: Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Leisure day at Diani Beach with optional activities such as Chale Island tours, Wasini Island dolphin excursions or water sports.

itinerary.title: Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Another day to relax along the white sandy beaches of Diani and enjoy resort facilities.

itinerary.title: Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Final full day at Diani Beach with optional excursions and beach activities.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Check out after lunch and transfer to Diani Airstrip for your afternoon flight back to Nairobi.

included: Accommodation on full board basis in the mentioned lodges
All-inclusive stay at Baobab Beach Resort & Spa
Professional driver guide and pre-tour briefing
All park entrance fees and relevant taxes
Return flight Nairobi - Diani - Nairobi on Safarilink
Wasini Island and Chale Island excursions
accommodation: Serena Mt Lodge - Mount Kenya (1 night)
Sarova Lion Hill Lodge - Lake Nakuru (1 night)
Lake Naivasha Sopa Lodge - Lake Naivasha (1 night)
Ashnil Mara Camp - Maasai Mara (3 nights)
Baobab Beach Resort & Spa - Diani Beach (4 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, a hat and sunglasses. Early mornings and evenings in the highlands can be cool so a sweater or light jacket is recommended.
travelInfo.food: Most lodges and hotels serve buffet-style meals with desserts, while some provide set menus. Food across the lodges is of international standard and prepared by professional chefs.

note: Adventures Connect LTD reserves the right to substitute accommodations with similar facilities in circumstances beyond our control.
